creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-03-26 17:17:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/p5-MIME-Lite-TT Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  MIME::Lite::TT is the wrapper of MIME::Lite which enabled Template::Toolkit
  as a template of email.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/~horiuchi/MIME-Lite-TT-0.02/
  
  PR:             ports/121987
  Submitted by:   Tuc <freebsd-ports at t-b-o-h.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.905     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/mail/p5-MIME-Lite-TT/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/p5-MIME-Lite-TT/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/mail/p5-MIME-Lite-TT/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/mail/p5-MIME-Lite-TT/pkg-plist (new)
